blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,700 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 46".
